game_info.title: Pico Squad
game_info.concept:
PICO PARK is a cooperative local/online multiplay action puzzle game for 2-8 players. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1509960/PICO_PARK/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ PICO PARK is a cooperative local/online multiplay action puzzle game for 2-8 players. * If you are connecting more than 5 Xbox controllers, please enable "Xbox Extended Feature Support" in Controller Settings.

PICO PARK is a cooperative local/online multiplay action puzzle game for 2-8 players.


The rule is quite simple: "Get all the keys and get to the goal and clear", but all 48 levels have special gimmicks designed specifically for multiplayer. At most levels, different gimmicks will appear as you move forward, and you will need to consult with your peers and think about new ways to cooperate.

This version is essentially a port of the one we released on the Nintendo Switch in 2019.
However, it's not just a port, it now supports online play.

The 2016 version of this link has been renamed "PICO PARK:Classic Edition"


[Flexible Level]
Each level of PICO PARK can be cleared when players get the key,unlock the door and all players reach it.But, every level requires cooperation to complete..

[Battle Mode]
Co-op play is the main work of this game, but let's compete with friends in BATTLE MODE once co-op play is completed.

[Endless Mode]
Even if you complete all 48 stages, you can play ENDLESS mode to aim at high score by collaborating with friends. By collaborating with friends, your score will grow faster.

[Online Play Mode]
You can play together online with people who are far away from you.
However, this is a game where communication is very important, so we recommend using Discord or Zoom to play while talking.

[TecoGamePad]
You can use your smartphone as a gamepad with the TecoGamePad. It can be downloaded from the App Store and Google Play.

Let's have fun playing PICO PARK with your friends!
game_info.description: Pico Squad is a puzzle-platformer where you simultaneously control a team of three colorful characters. Your objective is simple: collect the Golden Key and get ALL squad members to the Exit Door. The catch? You control everyone at once! You must coordinate your squad's movement, stack them on top of each other to reach high platforms, and combine their strength to push heavy blocks. Watch out for gaps and obstacles—if one member falls, the team fails. Cooperation with yourself is the key to victory!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Arrow Right: Move the entire squad horizontally
- Space: Make the entire squad jump
- Z: Regroup (Apply magnetic force to bring squad members closer together)
- Shift: Precision Mode (Move slower for careful positioning)
- Enter: Start Game / Next Level
- Escape: Pause / Unpause Game
- R: Restart the current level

TEST_1.test_description: Verifies the basic movement and win condition logic by attempting to beat the first level.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller calculates the centroid of the squad and moves it towards the key, then towards the door. It utilizes jump commands when blocked by walls or gaps.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The squad should successfully navigate the terrain, collect the key, and gather at the door, triggering the "LEVEL_COMPLETE" or "GAME_OVER_WIN" state.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the physics stability, stacking mechanics, and collision resolution.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Sends random movement and jump commands rapidly to create chaotic situations, attempting to force characters to stack or clip into geometry.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should remain stable with no crashes or characters falling out of bounds. The physics engine should resolve overlaps without "tunneling".
